heading: Modification of project of 1927; adoption
label: 702a–1 Modification of project of 1927; adoption
text: The project for the control of floods of the Mississippi River and its tributaries, adopted by , is modified in accordance with the recommendations of section 43 of the report submitted by the Chief of Engineers to the Chairman of the Committee on Flood Control, dated , and printed in House Committee on Flood Control Document Numbered 1, Seventy-fourth Congress, first session, as, in sections 642a, 702a–2 to 702a–12, 702g–1, 702j–1, 702j–2, 702k–1, and 702k–2 of this title, further modified and amended; and as so modified is adopted and authorized and directed to be prosecuted under the direction of the Secretary of the Army and the supervision of the Chief of Engineers.section 702a of this titleFebruary 12, 1935
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 702a–1½, , , which related to further modification of 1927 project, was transferred to .act June 28, 1938, ch. 795, § 452 Stat. 1220section 702a–1a of this titleA prior section 702a–1¾, , , which related to further modificiation and adoption of Lower Mississippi River flood control project, was transferred to .act Aug. 18, 1941, ch. 377, § 355 Stat. 642section 702a–1b of this title
